mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_order_item (order_id, book_id, book_title, price, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.orderId}, #{item.bookId}, #{item.bookTitle}, #{item.price}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT oi.item_id as itemId, oi.book_id as bookId, oi.book_title as bookTitle, e.author, e.cover_img as coverImg, oi.price FROM tb_order_item oi LEFT JOIN tb_ebook e ON oi.book_id = e.book_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY oi.item_id ASC
